steps.title: Use Tom's reaction
steps.content: Tom looks at the fence and immediately becomes miserable because he sees thirty yards of nine-foot board fence. The word must describe taking in the size or condition of what he has to paint.

steps.title: Reject actions he does not do
steps.content: B would mean Tom changed the fence. C would mean he arranged it, and D would mean he praised it. The context shows careful looking, not altering, organizing, or admiring. The answer is A.
